purpose: Offline proof that the pinned SWE-bench harness maps the pinned instance (repo, version) to exactly the recipe V4 executed -- the instance-level applicability bar that replaces the withdrawn global cross-pin gate.
recipe_selection_mechanism: MAP_REPO_VERSION_TO_SPECS_RUST[repo][version] -> TOKIO_SPECS[version] (pinned harness rust.py; no global dataset-revision cross-pin is consulted)

install: RUSTFLAGS=-Awarnings cargo test --locked --package tokio --test net_lookup_host --features full --no-fail-fast --no-run
pre_install:
cat > Cargo.lock <<'EOF_CARGO_LOCK'
# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
# It is not intended for manual editing.
version = 3
